identity.name: button-primary
identity.summary: Design target for the primary action button, derived from templates/DESIGN.md `components: button-primary` block. Captures the intended dimensions, typography slot, and state-token mapping.

source.comment: Values come from templates/DESIGN.md frontmatter — components: button-primary, button-primary-hover, button-primary-pressed, button-primary-focused, button-primary-disabled. Deltas from descriptive capture are documented in button-primary.findings.md.

rationale.layout.height: DESIGN.md says 32px (control-sized). Production uses 40px. Either DESIGN.md needs a `button-primary-lg` variant or production needs to align to 32px.
rationale.typography: DESIGN.md `typography.button` is 13px/600/16px lh. Production uses 16px/400/24px lh — title-sm scale, not button scale.
rationale.states.focus-visible: DESIGN.md specifies boxShadow: '0 0 0 2px {colors.accent-focus-ring}'. Production uses a transparent solid outline + likely Tailwind ring — should canonicalize on the boxShadow form so the focus treatment is portable across themes.
rationale.states.disabled: DESIGN.md defines disabled bg + fg tokens. Production crawl did not capture the disabled state on this page; needs a disabled-button-bearing route or a `--disabled-selector` flag.

a11y.comment: Native <button> needs no explicit role attribute. If using <a> for navigation-button hybrids, role='button' is required + Enter+Space activation.

antiPatterns: Stretching the button to fit a wider container by adding padding instead of using w-full — breaks the 32px-tall control rhythm.
Using `colors.accent` directly as the hover background — must use `colors.accent-hover` to differentiate the state.
Omitting the focus ring on `:focus-visible` (only :focus) — keyboard navigation invisible to sighted keyboard users.
